title: Japanese Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Japanese-inspired stir fry made with chewy vegetables and a hint of lime.

ingredients.name: chewy vegetables (such as bell peppers and carrots)

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add diced Canadian bacon and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add sliced chewy vegetables and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Pour in lime juice and stir in low-fat soy sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
